examples.title: OpenFlow Packet Handling
examples.description: Basic logic for controller processing packet-in events
examples.code:
PROCESS PacketIn(packet):
    IF packet.dest IN flow_table:
        FORWARD via existing path
    ELSE:
        CALCULATE new_route
        INSTALL flow_entry
        SEND packet_out
examples.explanation: Demonstrates reactive flow setup when new traffic pattern is detected
